config.rootPath: Path to the shared folder (chat-root) used as storage and transport. Required.
config.userId: Your user ID. Uses the OS user name when empty.
config.displayName: Your display name shown to others.
config.poll.fallbackSec: Fallback polling base interval in seconds (used in Phase 4).
config.watch.enabled: Enable the fs.watch layer (used in Phase 4).
config.imageInlinePreview: Show inline previews for image attachments.
config.threadDisplay: How thread replies are shown: inline in the timeline, or in a Slack-style thread pane on the right.
config.threadDisplay.inline: Show replies inline under the parent message in the timeline.
config.threadDisplay.thread: Show a "N replies" summary in the timeline and open replies in a thread pane on the right.
config.diagnostics.enabled: Log sync/update-detection diagnostics to the "SF Board" output channel (metadata only; no message content). Disabled by default.
config.confirmOpenPath: Show a confirmation dialog before opening a file/folder path written in a message. When on, the dialog also offers "Copy path".
